channel.title: Kano Git Master Skill
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Kano Git Master Skill

item.title: API Overview
item.description: API Overview This site publishes generated C++ API documentation under /api-docs/. Open generated API docs The generated API pages are produced from the public C++ facade headers with Doxygen.

item.title: index
item.description: Git Master Skill Documentation Version: 0.0.1 Status: Alpha Release Current command contract updated: 2026-06-22 This documentation set contains both current native-CLI docs ...

item.title: cli-architecture-proposal
item.description: Kano Git Master Skill - CLI Architecture Proposal Date: 2026-02-13 Status: Planning Phase Purpose: Convert shell script collection into unified CLI tool Current State Project ...

item.title: tui-branch-transplant-workflows
item.description: TUI Branch Transplant Workflows Date: 2026-03-13 Status: Planning Scope: kog tui branch-to-branch transplant UX for cherry-pick and rebase assist Overview This document defines ...

item.title: README
item.description: Profiling Area This directory contains curated build-feature profiling matrices that measure the effect of individual build options on compile and link times ...

item.title: v0.0.1-alpha-no-go
item.description: v0.0.1 Alpha GitHub Release No-Go Report Date: 2026-06-23 Status: Superseded on 2026-06-24 by the reviewed source-archive release. See v0.0.1 alpha release report and the published GitHub Release.

item.title: v0.0.1-alpha-release
item.description: v0.0.1 Alpha Release Report Date: 2026-06-24 GitHub Release: github.com/kanohorizonia/kano-git-master-skill/releases/tag/v0.0.1 Decision Publish GitHub Release v0.0.1 ...

item.title: repo-hygiene
item.description: KOG Repo Hygiene The kog repo-hygiene command is designed to detect and fix Git-index executable bits and CRLF/LF normalization issues before committing or exporting archives ...

item.title: KG-BUG-0005-scoped-commit-status-kinds
item.description: KG-BUG-0005 Scoped Commit Status Kinds kog converge scoped commit planning must preserve Git status semantics when it builds plan includes. Add, delete, and rename entries are not equivalent to a single current path: Deleted paths may no longer exist in the working tree but are still valid tracked pathspecs for git add -A.

item.title: changelog
item.description: Changelog All notable changes to the Git Master Skill project. [Unreleased] Validation Gates Public release candidates must pass git diff --check, the public docs script-reference audit, the pre-commit quality gate, and a native version/help smoke check before tagging.
